capabilities.title: Automotive
capabilities.description: We support mobility organizations with structured idea management, technology monitoring, product innovation processes, and portfolio governance. INCEPTION helps connect market signals, engineering ideas, supplier opportunities, and transformation priorities into one managed innovation flow.

capabilities.title: Oil, Gas and Petrochemical
capabilities.description: We design innovation management systems for oil, gas, energy, petrochemical, and materials companies. INCEPTION structures idea intake, technology roadmaps, process ownership, portfolio prioritization, and measurable innovation KPIs across complex industrial environments.

capabilities.title: Healthcare and Life Sciences
capabilities.description: We assist healthcare, biotech, vaccine, and diagnostics organizations with R&D prioritization, commercialization workflows, innovation governance, and evidence-based project evaluation. INCEPTION helps scientific teams move from scattered opportunities to structured innovation portfolios.

capabilities.title: High Tech and AI
capabilities.description: We help technology, telecom, AI, and digital infrastructure organizations organize innovation around weak signals, emerging technologies, business model options, and product development priorities. INCEPTION turns rapid change into governed strategic execution.

capabilities.title: Steel and Mining
capabilities.description: We enhance steel, mining, alumina, and mineral companies with technology needs identification, innovation process design, technology roadmapping, carbon foresight, and portfolio governance. INCEPTION helps industrial teams prioritize what to build, adopt, or scale.

actions.title: ISO 56000 Compliance
paragraphs: All services and products related to INCEPTION are compliant with the International Innovation Management Standard (ISO 56000). INNOTECH's ecosystem runs from the stage of assessing the readiness and maturity of innovation management in the organization to formulating processes, implementing software and implementing it. Implementing numerous projects with the best companies in the world makes INNOTECH a strategic partner for the development of innovation and technology in leading companies in the GCC and Turkey.

actions.title: Using Artificial Intelligence in Big Data Analysis
paragraphs: INNOTECH, as one of the leading consulting companies in the GCC and Turkey, uses big data analysis tools through artificial intelligence. This unique capability, beyond human capabilities, allows INNOTECH to accurately and in real time identify past, present and future trends in the market, technology, product and innovation and present them to leading companies in the GCC and Türkiye.

actions.title: Implementing 5-Star innovation management softwares in the World
paragraphs: INNOTECH has been providing a global and differentiated service in the GCC and Turkey region since 2024, in collaboration with the world's largest innovation and idea management software providers. The ITONICS innovation management operating system and BRIGHTIDEA innovation and idea management software are implemented in leading companies in the GCC and Turkey with different and outstanding features and with the support of INNOTECH experts.
